title: MCS Nether Mobs
description: This datapack adds more content to nether!
body:
RESOURCEPACK IS REQUIRED!
===
Main Information
===

* WARNING! (for PaperMC and PurpurMC Hosters):
This datapack will only work correctly if you only change the below settings.
Head over to your server, and go to "config/paper-world-defaults.yml" or "purpur.yml" file.
Find this "allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards" and set that to true.

* Creator and Developer: [​MC Silver]

Tested on: Vanilla & Spigot/Paper servers.  
[​You can suggest new gamerules and features on my discord server]

Gamerules
===
- You can modify gamerules with this commands 
1. /scoreboard players set #mcs_nether_mobs mcs_nether_mobs.. (0 or 1, 0 = false, 1 = true)
2. /function gamerule:mcs_nether_mobs/list
- You can also check which game rule is enabled/disabled. (/function gamerule:mcs_nether_mobs/check_status)

  Gamerules (All gamerules are true by default)

1. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.blaze_knight.spawning
2. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.classic_silverfish.spawning
3. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.crimson_creeper.spawning
4. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.crimson_mooshroom.spawning
5. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.hellfire_wolf.spawning
6. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.lost_soul.spawning
7. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.magma_zombie.spawning
8. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.piglin_fungus_thrower.spawning
9. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.range_piglin_brute.spawning
10. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.soul_blaze.spawning
11. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.warped_creeper.spawning
12. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.warped_mooshroom.spawning
13. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.warped_zombie.spawning
14. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.wither_skeleton_leader.spawning
15. mcs_nether_mobs..allow.zombified_piglin_brute.spawning

Commands
===
Give
---
/function give:mcs_nether_mobs/

Summon
---
/function summon:mcs_nether_mobs/

Mobs (New)
===
Blaze Knight
---
Basic information
- HP ❤️: 80 (40 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 48 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.25 (Normal)
- Attack Damage (Melee) 💪: 10 (5 hearts)
- Attack Damage (Range) 🔫: 6; 1 (fire damage for 5s.) [3 hearts; 0.5 heart]

Special Ability: 
- Creates shields that protect him from incoming damage.

Loot: 💰 [​1-2 items]
1. Nether Bricks (8-32) [34​%]
2. Blaze Rod (1-4) [27%]
3. Glowstone (2-8) [20%]
4. Fire Charged Shield (1) [17%]

Classic Silverfish
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 16 (8 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 32 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.3 (Fast)
- Attack Damage 💪: 2 (1 heart)

Loot: [Enderman with 50% chance)

Crimson Creeper
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 20 (10 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 16 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.25 (Normal)
- Explosion Power 💥: 2
- Fuse Time ⌛: 1s

Special Ability: 
- Immune to fire
- Sets enemy on fire
- Converts some blocks into a crimson theme blocks

Crimson Mooshroom
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 10 (5 hearts)
- Speed ⏩: 0.2 (Slow)
- Can be bred with crimson fungus

Special Ability:
- Gives suspicious stew with following random positive effects:
1.  Haste (45s./120s.) 
2. Strength (45s./120s.)
3. Instant Health (4.5s./12s.)
4. Jump Boost (45s./120s.)
5. Regeneration (45s./120s.)
6. Fire Resistance (45s./120s.)

Hellfire Wolf
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 20 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.325 (Fast)
- Knockback Resistance 🛡️: 0.2
- Attack Damage 💪: 6 (3 hearts)
- Can be tamed like a normal wolf

Special Ability:
- Immune to fire
- Heals when on fire
- Takes damage from water
- Untamed Hellfire Wolf is very aggressive

Lost Soul
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 20 (10 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 40 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.25 (Fast)
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 2 (1 heart)
- Weapon ⚔️: Stone Hoe; (Knockback II); [Damage: 1 points/0.5 heart]

Special Ability:
- Faster on soul sand
- Becomes invisible
- When invisible, he is 20% faster and heals 4 health

Magma Zombie
---
Basic information (default mode)
- HP ♥️: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 32 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.2 (Slow)
- Knockback Resistance 🛡️: 90%
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 3 (1.5 hearts)
- Weapon ⚔️: Stone Sword; (Fire Aspect I); [Damage: 5 points/2.5 hearts]

Basic information (hardened mode)
- HP ♥️: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 16 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.15 (Slow)
- Armor 🛡️: 20
- Knockback Resistance 🛡️: 100%
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 3 (1.5 hearts)
- Weapon ⚔️: Stone Sword; [Damage: 5 points/2.5 hearts]

Special Ability:
- Becomes hardened when it gets in water

Piglin Fungus Thrower
---
- HP ♥️: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 16 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.4 (Fast)

Special Ability:
- Throws warped fungus potion at enemies
- Uses regeneration, healing and fire resistance potions
- Drinks milk

Range Piglin Brute
---
- Same stats as Piglin Brute
- Weapon ⚔️: Crossbow; (Piercing IV, Quick Charge III); [Damage: 4-6 points/2-3 hearts]

Soul Blaze
---
Basic information
- HP ❤️: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 48 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 1.0 (Very Fast)
- Attack Damage (Melee) 💪: 6 (3 hearts)
- Attack Damage (Range) 🔫: 6; 1 (fire damage for 5s.) [3 hearts; 0.5 heart]

Special Ability: 
- Summons souls which attacks player

Loot: 💰 [1 item]
1. Blaze Rod (0-1)
2. Arrow of Levitation (0-2) [50%]
3. Lingering Potion of Levitation (1) [10%]

Warped Creeper
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 16 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.3 (Fast)
- Explosion Power 💥: 6
- Fuse Time ⌛: 3s

Special Ability: 
- Summons fangs which attacks enemies
- Randomly applies levitation effect on target
- Converts some blocks into a warped theme blocks

Warped Mooshroom
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 10 (5 hearts)
- Speed ⏩: 0.2 (Slow)
- Can be bred with warped fungus

Special Ability:
- Gives suspicious stew with following random positive effects:
1. Speed (45s./120s.) 
2. Resistance (45s./120s.)
3. Water Breathing (45s./120s.)
4. Invisibility (45s./120s.)
5. Absorption (45s./120s.)
6. Night Vision (45s./120s.)

Warped Zombie
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 25 (12.5 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 25 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.25 (Normal)
- Knockback Resistance 🛡️: 25%
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 5 (2.5 hearts)
- Weapon ⚔️: Stone Sword; [Damage: 5 points/2.5 hearts]

Wither Skeleton Leader
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 100 (50 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 24 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.3 (Fast)
- Knockback Resistance 🛡️: 40%
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 2 (1 heart)
- Weapons ⚔️: Stone Axe, Bow
- Armor 🛡️: Chainmail 

Special Ability:
- Randomly changes weapon
- Heals 4 health every 5s.
- Rarely summons Wither Skeleton

Loot: 💰 [Nether Fortress]

Zombified Piglin Brute
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 50 (50 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 24 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.23 (Slow)
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 5 (2.5 hearts)
- Weapon ⚔️: Golden Axe

Loot: 💰 [Zombified Piglin] (x2)

Mobs (Vanilla)
===
Piglin
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 24 (12 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 24 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.4 (Fast)
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 5 (2.5 hearts)
- Weapon ⚔️: Golden Sword; Crossbow

Special Abilities:
- Uses regeneration and fire resistance potion
- Replaces lava with blackstone in bastion

- Piglin attacks: Zombies, Skeletons, Phantoms, Illagers and Blaze.
- Piglin always attacks players in bastions.

Piglin Bartering Loot 💰: (0-2 items)
- Saddle; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 2)
- Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 2)
- Iron Ingot; [Count: 1-6]; (Weight: 8)
- Bone Meal; [Count: 10-24]; (Weight: 10)
- Lodestone; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 2)
- Glowstone Dust; [Count: 3-9]; (Weight: 10)
- Magma Cream; [Count: 2-4]; (Weight: 10)
- Iron Sword (random enchanted); [Count: 1]; (Weight: 5)
- Crossbow (random enchanted); [Count: 1]; (Weight: 5)
- Iron Hoe (random enchanted); [Count: 1]; (Weight: 5)
- Shroomlight; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 10)
- Cooked Porkchop; [Count: 3-9]; (Weight: 10)
- Rotten Flesh; [Count: 5-12]; (Weight: 20)
- Brown Mushroom; [Count: 2-4]; (Weight: 20)
- Higher, Randomly Enchanted Book; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 2)
- Normal, Randomly Enchanted Book; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 3)
- Enchanted Book (Soul Speed); [Count: 1]; (Weight: 5)
- Splash Potion of Fire Resistance; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 8)
- Potion of Fire Resistance; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 8)
- Iron Boots (Soul Speed); [Count: 1]; (Weight: 8)
- Ender Pearl; [Count: 2-4]; (Weight: 10)
- Iron Nugget; [Count: 10-36]; (Weight: 10)
- Awkward Water Bottle; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 10)
- Quartz; [Count: 5-12]; (Weight: 20)
- String; [Count: 3-9]; (Weight: 20)
- Gravel; [Count: 8-16]; (Weight: 40)
- Blackstone; [Count: 8-16]; (Weight: 40)
- Spectral Arrow; [Count: 6-12]; (Weight: 40)
- Nether Brick; [Count: 4-8]; (Weight: 40)
- Soul Sand; [Count: 2-8]; (Weight: 40)
- Leather; [Count: 2-4]; (Weight: 40)
- Fire Charge; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 40)
- Crying Obsidian; [Count: 1-3]; (Weight: 40)
- Obsidian; [Count: 1]; (Weight: 40)

Piglin doesn't has infinite trades and it can renew it after some time in the nether dimension only. (In crimson forest it has higher chance to refill trades)
Bartering with Piglin is 50% faster 

Loot: 💰 [Piglin Barter] (Chance: 12%)

Piglin Brute
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 50 (25 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 24 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.35 (Fast)
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 5 (2.5 hearts)
- Weapon ⚔️: Golden Axe

Piglin Brute attacks all mobs which enters bastion

Special Abilities:
- Uses regeneration and fire resistance potion
- Replaces lava with blackstone in bastion

Loot: 💰 [Piglin Barter] (Chance: 25%)

Wither
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 600 (300 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 60 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 1.0 (Very Fast)

Special Abilities:
- Shoots wither skulls
- Summons Wither Skeletons
- Can sometimes become invincible
- Sometimes it flies higher
- Summons auto-aim wither skulls
- Summons wither clouds
- Turns a withered mob into a Wither Skeleton

Loot: 💰
1. Nether Star
2. 4 bastion loots

Wither Skeleton
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 30 (15 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 24 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.25 (Normal)
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 5 (2.5 hearts) + wither effect
- Weapon ⚔️: Stone Sword

Special Abilities:
- Spawns randomly with chainmail armor
- Rarely spawns with stone hoe, stone axe and bow

Zoglin
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 24 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.3 (Fast)
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 3-8 (1.5-4 hearts) 

Special Abilities:
- Eats items and heal

Hoglin
---
Basic information
- HP ♥️: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range 👁️: 24 blocks
- Speed ⏩: 0.3 (Fast)
- Attack Damage (Base) 💪: 3-8 (1.5-4 hearts) 

Special Abilities:
- Immune to fire

Strider
---
Special Abilities:
- Striders are much faster
- Strider warm blocks are: fire, lava, crimson nylium, soul fire, glowstone, campfire, magma block
- Striders take damage from ice blocks

Mob Spawning
===
Basalt Deltas
---
- Magma Zombie: (Spawn Chance: 10%)
- Blaze: (Spawn Chance: 5%)

Crimson Forest
---
- Crimson Mooshroom: (Spawn Chance: 10%)
- Hellfire Wolf: (Spawn Chance: 10%)
- Crimson Creeper: (Spawn Chance: 10%)

Soul Sand Valley
---
- Wither Skeleton: (Spawn Chance: 10%)
- Lost Soul: (Spawn Chance: 10%)
- Soul Blaze: (Spawn Chance: 10%)
- Vex: (Spawn Chance: 10%)

Warped Forest
---
- Warped Creeper: (Spawn Chance: 10%)
- Warped Mooshroom: (Spawn Chance: 10%)
- Warped Creeper: (Spawn Chance: 10%)
- Classic Silverfish: (Spawn Chance: 20%)
- Phantom: (Spawn Chance: 10%)

Zombie Virus
